---
name: Feature request
about: A new architecture family, hardware target, workflow, or output
title: "[feature]: "
labels: enhancement
---

**What do you want AC to do?**

**Which capability does it touch?**
greenfield / modifier / delta-eval / stress / auto-calibrate / trust-audit / packaging / other

**The decision it would help you make**
AC exists to make architecture design quantitative — describe the decision
(e.g. "compare NSA vs MLA at 1M context under a 40ms TBT budget").

**Reference material (optional)**
Papers, ablations, hardware datasheets, or measured traces that should
calibrate the behavior.

**Willing to contribute?**
yes / no / with guidance
